findings.evidence: Generic base criterion already lives at `Algebra/GroupAction/OrbitRelQuotient.lean:120`; normalizer quotient equality is generic at `Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean:164`; the deck proof body at lines 212-225 contains no deck-specific facts beyond substituting `Deck p` and `p ⁻¹' {b}`.
findings.fix: Add a generic lemma in `TauCeti.MulAction` such as `orbitRelQuotient_smul_eq_smul_iff_normalizerQuotientMk_inv_eq [IsCancelSMul G X] (H : Subgroup G) [H.Normal] (x : X) (g k : G)`, then derive the deck and covering wrappers from it.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_normalizerQuotientMk_inv_eq` is a special case of a generic theorem for any cancellative `G`-action and normal `H ≤ G`; the proof uses only `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff`, `smul_smul`, `IsCancelSMul.right_cancel`, normality, and `Subgroup.normalizerQuotientMk_eq_iff_div_mem`, not deck-cover topology.

summary: The previous unnecessary transitivity/regularity assumptions are gone, but the new normalizer-quotient equality criterion is still introduced at a deck-fibre specialization instead of the natural generic cancellative-action level.
